params.markdown:
This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of security rule alerts using various visualizations. It includes saved searches for rule details, along with key metrics for total alerts. The alert distribution is represented through pie charts for alert states, bar charts for rule name, and a line chart tracking trends over time. Additionally, tables highlight the top 10 hosts, source IPs, and destination IPs, providing insights into high-risk entities.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/google_secops/overview)
